tagline: The Easiest Way to a Perfect, Protected, Pristine, Carefree Pool

hero.headline: Long Island's Most Trusted Family Pool Experts
hero.subheadline: For over 26 years, the Romanelli family has kept Long Island pools crystal clear and stress-free. Real-time tracking, weekly health reports, and zero paperwork — just a perfect pool every time you step outside.
checkmarks: 100% digital platform with real-time technician tracking
Transparent pricing with no hidden fees — ever
2,000+ pools served across Long Island since 1999

services.headline: Everything Your Pool Needs, Handled by One Family
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full equipment overhauls, we take every headache off your plate so you can just enjoy your backyard.

cards.title: Complete Care Bundles
cards.description: All-inclusive weekly maintenance packages covering water balancing, chemical treatment, skimming, and seasonal openings and closings — bundled so you never think twice.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Replacement
cards.description: Custom-measured, professionally installed vinyl liners using durable, high-quality materials for a flawless finish that lasts for years.

cards.title: Equipment Upgrades
cards.description: Variable-speed pumps, salt chlorine systems, smart automation, and energy-efficient heaters — we modernize your pool and cut your energy bills.

cards.title: Safety Pool Covers
cards.description: Photo-measured safety covers in mesh or solid options to protect your family, pets, and pool through every off-season.

cards.title: Pool Openings & Closings
cards.description: Seasonal prep done right — we get your pool swim-ready in spring and properly winterized before the first freeze hits Long Island.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Fast, accurate diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and controls to keep your system running at peak efficiency.

how_it_works.headline: Three Simple Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Share a few details about your pool size, type, and current condition. We'll recommend the perfect care plan for your situation.

steps.title: We Handle Everything
steps.description: Our trained technicians arrive on schedule, service your pool, and send you a real-time health report — all tracked digitally, no paperwork.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Perfect Pool
steps.description: Step outside to crystal-clear water every single time. We monitor, adjust, and protect your pool so you never have to worry.

about.label: Family-Owned Since 1999
about.headline: The Romanelli Family Has Been Caring for Long Island Pools for Over 26 Years
about.description: What started as a father-and-son operation in Bohemia has grown into one of Long Island's most trusted pool service companies. We don't just maintain pools — we solve problems. From turning green, algae-filled water crystal clear in days to installing cutting-edge automation that saves you money, our team treats every pool like it's our own. Licensed and insured in both Nassau and Suffolk Counties, we've built our reputation on showing up, doing the job right, and making pool ownership genuinely easy.

features.title: 100% Digital Platform
features.description: Real-time technician tracking, weekly pool health reports, and zero paperwork — everything managed from your phone.

features.title: Licensed & Insured
features.description: Fully licensed and insured in both Nassau and Suffolk Counties. Your pool and property are always protected.

features.title: BOLI Award Winners
features.description: Recognized with the BOLI 2026 X Winners Award for excellence in pool service across Long Island.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every plan is customized to your pool's size and needs. We'll walk you through your options with full transparency — no hidden fees, no upsells, just honest pricing from a family that's been doing this for 26 years.

guarantee.headline: Our Clear Water Promise
guarantee.description: If your pool isn't crystal clear after our service visit, we'll come back and make it right — no questions asked, no extra charge. We've staked 26 years of our family name on delivering perfect pools, and we're not about to stop now.

faqs.question: What areas of Long Island do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Suffolk County and Nassau County, including Bohemia, Patchogue, East Setauket, Bellmore, and surrounding communities across Long Island.

faqs.question: How does your digital platform work?
faqs.answer: Everything runs through our 100% digital system — no paperwork. You get real-time technician tracking so you know exactly when we're at your pool, plus weekly pool health reports delivered straight to your phone or email.

faqs.question: Can you fix a pool that's turned green with algae?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in pool recoveries and can transform even the worst green, algae-filled pools back to crystal-clear water in just a few days. It's one of the things we do best.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes — we are fully licensed and insured in both Nassau County and Suffolk County. We also hold a BBB Business Profile and received the BOLI 2026 X Winners Award.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home when your technicians visit?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Our technicians handle everything while you're away, and you'll receive a detailed digital report after each visit so you always know exactly what was done.

testimonials.name: Mitchell Schwartz
testimonials.text: Opened my inground pool. Got it clear in 2 days. It looks better than it has in 10 years. Great customer service!

testimonials.name: Steven Krinsky
testimonials.text: Excellent service, on-time, always returns calls. Technicians were professional.

testimonials.name: Mike Hickey
testimonials.text: Very professional service provider. Detail oriented and some of the nicest people around.

contact.headline: Ready for a Pool You Actually Enjoy?
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your pool and we'll put together a custom care plan — no obligation, no pressure, just honest advice from a family that's been doing this since 1999.
benefits: Custom care plan tailored to your pool

footer.description: Paul Romanelli & Son Pool Service has been keeping Long Island pools pristine since 1999. Family-owned, fully licensed, and trusted by over 2,000 homeowners across Nassau and Suffolk Counties.
footer.service_area: Serving all of Long Island — Suffolk County, Nassau County, Bohemia, Patchogue, East Setauket, Bellmore, and surrounding communities.
